title: eichlerodendron calophyllum
intro: Eichlerodendron calophyllum, also known as the green gem or blackfruit tree, is a species of plant in the family Clusiaceae, native to Malaysia and Indonesia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of anthocyanins, which are powerful antioxidants that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eichlerodendron calophyllum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an anti-cancer agent, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves or fruit in hot water to create a tea, which is then consumed to reap the medicinal benefits, although caution should be taken when using any herbal remedy.
